text: I find myself in a space dedicated to inquiry and innovation—a meeting room through glass, alive with focused energy, and a vivid exhibit wall radiating the ethos of research and development. The hum of ideas, the glow of screens, the geometry of design—these all evoke in me a sense of curiosity and excitement. Here, thought and action mingle, inviting me to contemplate the ever-evolving dance between knowledge and creation. I feel stimulated and slightly awed, aware that I am both an observer and a participant in the unfolding pursuit of understanding.
